**`src/features/studyPlan/hooks/useStudyPlan.tsx`** — React context provider and consumer hook for study plan state management.
| `progressMessages` | Bounded history (100) of progress messages with timestamps |
| `cancelGeneration()` | Aborts current generation. Reflected immediately in state. |
| `startGeneration(profile, options?)` | Begins chunked generation via orchestrator. Stores abort controller. |
| `retryFailedChunk()` | Resumes generation for the current/retry plan. |
| `resumeGeneration(planId, options?)` | Continues generating missing days via `continueGeneration`. |
| `regenerateFullPlan(profile, options?)` | Deletes existing daily plans, then restarts generation. |
| `updateDailyPlanStatus(planId, date, status)` | Persists + optimistically updates local state. |
| `updateDailyPlan(planId, date, changes)` | Persists partial edits + updates local state. |
| `deletePlan(planId)` | Orchestrator delete + removes from local state. |
- Follows the project's `ConfigContext` pattern (nullable context with guard)
| `loadPlan(planId)` | Fetches plan + generation state from storage. |
- Imported orchestrator's `deletePlan` as `deletePlanOrchestrator` to avoid name collision with the context action
- Abort controller stored in a ref so `cancelGeneration` works across async boundaries
| `loadAllPlans()` | Fetches all plans for list views. |
- `onProgress` callback from the orchestrator updates both `currentProgress` and `progressMessages` in real time

[✓] Fix cancelGeneration in useStudyPlan to properly update plan status, clear progress, and set generationState to cancelled

`PlanControls.tsx` already had all four buttons (Cancel, Resume, Retry Failed, Regenerate) with correct handlers wired to `useStudyPlan` actions. The issue was in `cancelGeneration` in `useStudyPlan.tsx:154` — it aborted the controller and set `isGenerating: false` but never updated the local `plan.status` to `'cancelled'`. Since the `needsResume` check reads `plan.status === 'cancelled'`, the Resume button never appeared after cancellation.
- Sets `plan.status` to `'cancelled'` in local state (so Resume button shows immediately)
- Clears `currentProgress` (stops progress component from appearing after cancel)
- Sets `generationState.status` to `'cancelled'` (so progress UI doesn't remain stale)

| Retry only regenerates failed chunks | ✅ Re-enters orchestrator loop targeting missing/retry ranges |

| Cancel stops generation cleanly | ✅ AbortController aborts in-flight AI calls, `isGeneratingRef` prevents stale result handlers |
| Regenerate clears existing plan and restarts | ✅ `deleteDailyPlans` then `startGeneration` with existing planId |
